channel.title: Ruh Al Tarikh - Cinematic Islamic Archive

videos.title: The Hidden Wall of Dhul-Qarnayn Explained
videos.description: Explore the mysterious wall mentioned in the Quran and its historical significance. A deep dive into Islamic history, the Quran, and the legend of Dhul-Qarnayn.

videos.title: Quranic Interpretation of Ancient Civilizations
videos.description: Understand how the Quran discusses ancient empires and their lessons for modern times. A comprehensive study of Islamic scholarship, comparative religion, and historical analysis.

videos.title: Prophecy and End Times in Islamic Tradition
videos.description: Examine the prophetic narratives of the Quran and their interpretations across Islamic scholarship. Exploring signs of the hour and eschatological discussions.

videos.title: Science and Religion: A Historical Perspective
videos.description: A deep discussion on the relationship between scientific discovery and Islamic teachings throughout history. Featuring scholars and experts in dialogue.

videos.title: Educational Guide to Islamic History
videos.description: A comprehensive documentary covering major periods of Islamic civilization, from the early years to the modern era. Featuring primary sources and historical analysis.

videos.title: The Golden Age of Islam: Science and Philosophy
videos.description: Discover how Islamic scholars revolutionized mathematics, astronomy, medicine, and philosophy during the Golden Age. Exploring contributions to world civilization.

videos.title: Tafsir of Surah Al-Kahf - The Cave
videos.description: An in-depth Quranic interpretation of Surah Al-Kahf, exploring its stories, lessons, and spiritual significance. Classical and contemporary scholarly perspectives.

videos.title: The Crusades: A Cinematic History
videos.description: Explore the pivotal historical events of the Crusades and their lasting impact on Islamic and Western civilizations. A balanced and scholarly examination.

videos.title: Gog and Magog: Revealing the Truth
videos.description: An analysis of Islamic eschatology and the prophecies regarding Gog and Magog in Islamic texts and modern scholarship. Evidence-based interpretation.

videos.title: The Ottoman Empire: Rise and Fall
videos.description: A comprehensive study of the Ottoman Empire, its contributions to civilization, and the factors leading to its decline. Exploring legacy and influence.

videos.title: Islamic Finance: Ancient Systems, Modern Relevance
videos.description: Explore Islamic banking and finance systems, their historical roots, and contemporary applications in the global economy. Comprehensive economic analysis.

videos.title: The Silk Road: Trade and Cultural Exchange
videos.description: Journey along the historic Silk Road and discover how Islamic civilizations facilitated global trade and knowledge exchange. Connecting East and West.

videos.title: Islamic Architecture: Beauty in Design
videos.description: Discover the principles of Islamic architecture, from mosques to palaces, and their enduring aesthetic and spiritual influence. An artistic and spiritual exploration.
